ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the session is part of */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time slot for the session */,
  "topic" TEXT /* Topic of the session */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the speaker leading the session */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the session takes place */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of session (e.g., Lecture, Workshop, Panel Discussion) */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of attendees allowed */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current number of attendees registered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the session (e.g., Scheduled, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the conference */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the conference */,
  "venue" INTEGER /* Venue where the conference is held */,
  "conference_type" TEXT /* Type of conference (e.g., Annual, Special Edition) */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the conference website */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_conferences_venue FOREIGN KEY ("venue") REFERENCES conference_venues ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speakers" (
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each speaker */,
  "speaker_name" TEXT /* Full name of the speaker */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the speaker */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the speaker */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the speaker */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL to the speaker's profile picture */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media links (e.g., LinkedIn, Twitter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("speaker_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Slides, Recordings) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was uploaded */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_size" TEXT /* Size of the resource file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_resources_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendees" (
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendee */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference the attendee is registered for */,
  "attendee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the attendee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the attendee */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the attendee registered for the conference */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the attendee (e.g., Attendee, Speaker, Organizer) */,
  "registration_status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., Pending, Confirmed, Cancelled) */,
  "badge_number" TEXT /* Badge number for the attendee */,
  "dietary_preferences" TEXT /* Dietary preferences (e.g., Vegetarian, Vegan) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendees_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of the session */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Attended, Missed, Registered) */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the attendee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time when the attendee checked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendance_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_attendance_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_presentations" (
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each presentation */,
  "speaker_id" INTEGER /* ID of the speaker */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the presentation is part of */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the presentation */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the presentation */,
  "presentation_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the presentation */,
  "presentation_format" TEXT /* Format of the presentation (e.g., Slide Deck, Video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_presentations_speaker_id FOREIGN KEY ("speaker_id") REFERENCES speakers ("speaker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_presentations_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "presentation_resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation the resource belongs to */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource (e.g., Slides, Recordings) */,
  "resource_link" TEXT /* Link to the resource */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was uploaded */,
  "resource_description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "resource_size" TEXT /* Size of the resource file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_presentation_resources_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES speaker_presentations ("presentation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference_venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue (e.g., WiFi, Catering) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Session Content, Speaker Performance) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_feedback_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "speaker_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of feedback */,
  "presentation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the presentation */,
  "attendee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the attendee providing feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the attendee (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the attendee */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., Session Content, Speaker Performance) */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_feedback_presentation_id FOREIGN KEY ("presentation_id") REFERENCES speaker_presentations ("presentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_speaker_feedback_attendee_id FOREIGN KEY ("attendee_id") REFERENCES attendees ("attendee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_sponsors" (
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsor */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "sponsor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_level" TEXT /* Level of sponsorship (e.g., Gold, Silver, Bronze) */,
  "sponsor_logo" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's logo */,
  "sponsor_website" TEXT /* URL to the sponsor's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_sponsors_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sponsorships" (
  "sponsorship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sponsorship */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conference */,
  "sponsor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sponsor */,
  "sponsorship_amount" REAL /* Amount of sponsorship provided */,
  "sponsorship_description" TEXT /* Description of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the sponsorship */,
  "sponsorship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the sponsorship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sponsorship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES session_sponsors ("sponsor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sponsorships_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)
